notes: Diagnostic cases for testing N-dimension regularity after host-side N padding optimization.
All cases use M=4096, K=4096, sparsity=95, d=16 to isolate N behavior.
N_kernel16 in source_hint is ceil(N/16)*16, which is what the padded host path should pass to the kernel.
Compare non-16 cases such as N=4093 against their padded N_kernel16 neighbors, especially N=4096.
Generated datasets still store original N. Padding is performed by main.cpp at runtime.

cases.name: nreg_m4096_n1021_k4096_s95_d16
cases.source_hint: N-regularity sweep: non-16 N, host pads by 3 columns to N_kernel=1024; N_kernel16=1024, pad_cols=3, n_blocks=64, bpack_tail_blocks=0, aic_tail_cols_mod128=0

cases.name: nreg_m4096_n1024_k4096_s95_d16
cases.source_hint: N-regularity sweep: 1024-aligned full B-pack; N_kernel16=1024, pad_cols=0, n_blocks=64, bpack_tail_blocks=0, aic_tail_cols_mod128=0
